race.description: The Curragh, Where Champions Are Made, Handicap
race.comment: ZAKOUMA (14) is a progressive mare who has been dominant in two wins this time in, coming from well back in the run to score by 2.5 lengths on each occasion. She swept on by PANTILE WARRIOR (15) last start at Sandown Hillside and 2000m at Flemington looks ideal. She'll get back from the wide draw again but has always promised plenty and might just be too good again. PANTILE WARRIOR was much better second up and can improve again here. He'll give a sight up in trip having shown Group level staying form in the UK prior to coming here. JARETH (12) has been good in two runs this time in and can go again up in trip. POLITELY DUN (16) is rarely far away and appears the next in line.

favourite.silk_colours: PALE BLUE, GREEN HOOPS AND CAP
favourite.owners: Wyadup Valley Farm (Mgr: T J Delroy)
